mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals a weakening labor market that reduces consumer spending and corporate profits, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with UNRATE > 4.5% are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts above 1.3 million units signals a strengthening housing market that boosts consumer confidence and spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with HOUST > 1.3M are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production below 103 signals a weakening supply chain that reduces corporate profits and investment, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO < 103 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in payroll employment above 160,000 signals a strengthening labor market that boosts consumer spending and corporate profits, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with PAYEMS > 160K are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP above 240,000 signals a strengthening economy that boosts consumer spending and corporate profits, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with GDPC1 > 240K are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the Consumer Price Index above 322 signals a strengthening inflation environment that boosts interest rates and reduces equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with CPIAUCSL > 322 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real disposable personal income above 726,000 signals a strengthening consumer environment that boosts spending and corporate profits, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with RSAFS > 726K are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).
